title: Paradox Launcher Settings
description: Paradox game launcher configuration file (launcher-settings.json), located in the game root directory or its launcher/ subdirectory.

version.description: Full display version string for the game, typically including a version name, version number, and build identifier (e.g. "Cetus v4.3.2 (171a)").

rawVersion.description: Raw version number of the game (e.g. "v4.3.2").

gameDataPath.description: Path to the game data directory. May contain placeholders such as %USER_DOCUMENTS% (e.g. "%USER_DOCUMENTS%/Paradox Interactive/Stellaris").

themeFile.description: Relative path to the launcher theme configuration file (e.g. "./assets/theme-settings.json").

browserDlcUrl.description: URL to open the DLC store page in the browser.

exePath.description: Relative path to the game executable (e.g. "./stellaris.exe").

exeArgs.description: Command-line arguments passed to the game executable on launch.

ingameSettingsLayoutPath.description: Relative path to the in-game settings layout file (e.g. "./settings-layout.json").

alternativeExecutables.description: List of alternative launch modes available to the user (e.g. cross-store multiplayer).

alternativeExecutable.description: Configuration for an alternative executable entry, defining an additional way to launch the game.

exePath.description: Relative path to the game executable for this alternative launch mode.

exeArgs.description: Command-line arguments passed to the executable for this alternative launch mode.

label.description: Localized display name for this alternative launch mode. Keys are IETF language tags (e.g. "en", "zh-hans"); values are the corresponding display strings.

additionalProperties.description: Display name in the corresponding language.

visibleIn.description: List of launcher UI locations where this alternative launch mode is shown (e.g. "GAME_SETTINGS", "HOME_PAGE").
